programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: It is the last immunity pin up for grabs before finals week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: French Restaurants
programme.desc: This episode splits the contestants into two teams and will be responsible for every aspect of the restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Childhood Memories
programme.desc: The contestants need to draw on childhood memories as an inspiration for their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top five contestants enter the kitchen to face the last mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Panama Dining Room Service Challenge
programme.desc: The challenge is off-site at Panama Dining Room, in Melbourne's inner-city suburb of Fitzroy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Jacqui Challinor
programme.desc: The contestants are excited to arrive for their chance to cook for an Immunity Pin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Darren Purchese's Peach Melba
programme.desc: The group facing today’s Pressure Test wake for what may be their last day in the house

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: What's in the Fridge
programme.desc: It’s the first elimination of the season!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Ashley Palmer-Watts' Sherried Marron
programme.desc: It's the first pressure test of finals week and the bottom three contestants from the previous invention test line up for what will be the last time in the MasterChef kitchen for one of them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Metter, Michelle and Samira wake in the house to find themselves facing a feared Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - SecondBite's Six-Course Degustation Challenge
programme.desc: This episode is all about raising money for Second Bite, a charity that the program supports. Contestants will cook using only ingredients donated by the charity, cooking a six-course degustation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Fast-Track to Finals Immunity Challenge: Reynold Poernomo and Matt Sinclair
programme.desc: The winner of the mystery box and of the invention test will face off in round one, vying for the chance to cook off against a professional cook in round two to get fast-tracked to Finals Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Nigella's Mystery Box Challenge & Food Physics Invention Test
programme.desc: It’s the start of a new week in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's the grand finale of 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Royal Reception Catering Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants receive a surprise message in the Masterchef house which informs them of their next group challenge and where they'll be travelling to.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Saransh Goila
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face elimination in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: World Class & MasterClass 5
programme.desc: The elimination challenge will determine who will go into the semifinal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Chocolate Wheel Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the previous challenge will fight for their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Maggie Beer's Chicken Elimination Challenge and MasterClass 2 Poh Ling Yeoh
programme.desc: For the elimination challenge, the contestants go to Maggie Beer's Eatery.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (18 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (19 out of 39)

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Jo Barrett, Gavin Hughes, John Rivera
programme.desc: The winners of the Mystery Box and Invention Test cooking in today’s Immunity Challenge

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Mystery Box Challenge & Royalty Cooking Challenge
programme.desc: For the mystery box challenge, the contestants find a big surprise among their ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Adriano Zumbo's Mystery Box Challenge & Croquembouche Invention Test
programme.desc: The judges reveal this is Sweet Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Trifle Tasting Elimination Challenge & MasterClass 1
programme.desc: It’s the elimination after yesterday’s epic Brunch Battle

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Kylie Millar
programme.desc: The three least impressive contestants from the invention test cook-off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Kappo-style Degustation Menu
programme.desc: Each of the eight contestants will be part of an 8-course Kappo-style degustation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge: Jarrod Di Blasi
programme.desc: The top three contestants now compete in creating a family meal for four in half-an-hour.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test battle it out for the chance to cook for an immunity pin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best invention test performers now face a special souffle immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants must cook a dish that celebrates where they have come from and where they are going.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers from the invention test now compete for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The three least impressive contestants from the service challenge must cook to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Heston Blumenthal Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Heston Blumenthal week. Heston takes the top 12 contestants on a road trip through regional Victoria.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Visual Perception Elimination Challenge/Masterclass
programme.desc: The seven members of the losing team from the vegetarian feast challenge are facing elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Auditions: Part 1
programme.desc: The heat is on. A fresh group of home cooks from around the country will eagerly tackle challenges that will see one of them take home the title and $250,000.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Relay
programme.desc: The contestants are split into teams of four in a relay challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Invention Test: Fire
programme.desc: Contestants have 60 minutes to cook a savoury dish inspired by fire.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Christy Tania's Ice Cream Float
programme.desc: The contestants have to recreate an ice cream float with helium-filled toffee balloon.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Shaun Quade's Pearl on the Ocean Floor
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now cook off in a pressure test to avoid elimination.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP7
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.
